stemHtml: Which of the following happens when excessive rudder is applied in a skidding turn?

options.a: The angle of attack (AoA) increases on the outer wing and decreases on the inner wing.
options.b: The AoA decreases on the outer wing and increases on the inner wing.
options.c: The AoA increases on both wings equally.
options.d: The AoA decreases on both wings equally.
